replies.msg: D6同死神之前係咪中過？

MILAN – FC Internazionale Milano announce that Stefan de Vrij and Matias Vecino have tested positive for Covid-19 following tests that were taken yesterday. The two Nerazzurri are both already in quarantine in their homes.
Having been informed of the new positive cases, the ATS of Milan has decided on the following actions:

• Immediate suspension of any type of team activity for four days, including Sunday 21 March.
• Inter vs. Sassuolo, scheduled for Saturday 20 March 2021, is to be postponed.
• Players are prohibited from fulfilling any call-ups to their respective national teams.

On Monday 22 March, the whole team will be re-swabbed and tested before the eventual resumption of activities.

今個禮拜可以唔使踢
同埋唔使踢太公波！
放假放到國際日後 又唔洗飛黎飛去
